name: lifelong-kindergarten-cultivating-creativity-through-projects-passion-peers-and-play
description: Mitchel Resnick's 'Lifelong Kindergarten: Cultivating Creativity through Projects, Passion, Peers, and Play' — from the MIT Media Lab. The 4 P's framework. Scratch coding platform. Creative learning spiral. How the kindergarten approach should be the model for learning at all ages.
